global.description: The ad features a vibrant teal background with a central product display and clear call-to-action.
global.main_message: Promoting a new product collection at a special price for a limited time.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A smooth, solid teal background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A minimalist illustration of two mirrors is centered, outlined in a subtle white stroke, suggesting a stylish product.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, white text reads 'New collection drop', prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline states 'Only this weekend', providing urgency.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A bright white price tag reading '€9.99' is positioned below the subheadline, drawing attention.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent, rounded button with the text 'Install now' in white, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge in yellow with the word 'SALE' in bold, eye-catching text at the top right corner.
elements.text_content: New collection drop Only this weekend €9.99 Install now

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'ZenDrop' appears in a clean, modern font at the top left corner, reinforcing brand identity.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small, white label with the text 'UGC' in the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the product display is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
